# Scout — find the gym that actually fits

> Scout is a gym-discovery platform (Tampa, FL beta) with per-fact provenance:
> every amenity, machine, price, and parking note carries its source and
> confidence. Vibes are soft signals; equipment is ground truth.

## What Scout knows per gym
- Equipment to machine level (racks w/ counts, dumbbell max, hip thrust /
  leg curl variants, specialty powerlifting gear), with brands
- Amenities (sauna, cold plunge, pool, childcare, café, co-working,
  women's-only areas) with source labels
- Real day-pass / membership pricing and drop-in policy (walk in, book
  first, restricted, trial route, members only)
- Parking intelligence (on-site lots, garages w/ validation notes, OSM-
  mapped options) + bike/transit access
- Hours with open-now, photo galleries from gyms' own sites, community
  reviews and visit logs

## Key pages
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/ — explore Tampa gyms (list + Waypoint map)
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/gym/{slug} — full gym profiles
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/about — how the data verification ladder works
- https://scout-gym.netlify.app/blog — guides grounded in our dataset

## Data honesty
Unknown facts say "unlisted" — Scout never invents details. Sources rank:
owner > scout-verified > user-confirmed > web data > curated > estimated.
